title: Remote Cultural Consultant Tooling
problem_or_desire: Churn due to poor communication onboarding in distributed digital agencies
core_concept: Pre-composed interactive playbooks that teams execute during onboarding asynchronously
proposed_approach: Interactive documentation SaaS measuring engagement speed through team progress reports
prototype_scope: Three modular asynchronous playbooks delivered in interactive documentation files

title: Technical Debt Resolution Tasking
problem_or_desire: Difficulty hiring fractional experts to debug one-off legacy code patches
core_concept: Micro-scope project matchmaking for specific legacy codebases.
proposed_approach: A manual matchmaking service connecting solo founders with developers specialized in specific legacy frameworks for small bug fixes.
prototype_scope: A manual job board/matching service for 3 specific niche bug-fix projects. | Identify 3 niche legacy frameworks.; Find 3 developers per framework.; Match with 3 founders.; Monitor resolution success.

title: Procurement Auditor Agent
problem_or_desire: Difficulty identifying overcharges and contract non-compliance in high-volume invoice processing.
core_concept: An autonomous agent that cross-references invoices against signed contracts and market price benchmarks.
proposed_approach: Integrate with accounting software to flag discrepancies and draft dispute emails for human approval.
prototype_scope: A script that processes 50 sample PDF invoices against a single contract template to identify price variances.

title: Low-Acid Caffeine Concierge
problem_or_desire: Inconsistency in non-irritating, laboratory-tested gentle preparation methods in cafe environments
proposed_approach: Sub-sampling subscription offering batch-certified low-acid coffee beans screened for standardized PH levels
prototype_scope: A pH-measuring toolkit distributed to participants to gather subjective reaction data vs objectively measured laboratory acidity

title: Regulatory Change Response Architect
target_user: Food and beverage quality assurance heads
problem_or_desire: Drastic differences in health safety manual implementation when regulations shift locally.
core_concept: Mapping new legislation changes to existing internal standard operating procedure documents using diff identification.
proposed_approach: Monitoring governmental regulatory feeds for trigger keywords and automatically highlighting modified procedure steps for policy-drafter human rewrite.
prototype_scope: Dashboard tool for monitoring two specific municipality codes impacting packaging labeling.

title: Remote Onboarding Video Library
problem_or_desire: Repetitive, time-consuming onboarding of new remote hires
core_concept: A library of high-quality, customizable video templates for company policies and tools
proposed_approach: Professional video production templates that companies can brand and host internally
prototype_scope: A set of three sample video templates hosted on a private video platform

title: StudioPulse
problem_or_desire: Difficulty calculating the correct time allowance for revisions vs. design production
core_concept: Predictive duration simulator based on project parameters.
proposed_approach: A calculator that allows designers to input project variables and receive a rough estimate based on their own historical data.
prototype_scope: A web form that outputs a time estimate based on user-defined multipliers. | Define 5-10 project variables; Build a form to collect these variables; Implement a simple calculation logic

title: Hyper-Local Micro-Roast Subscription
target_user: Remote workers living in suburban neighborhoods
problem_or_desire: Desire for ultra-fresh coffee without the commute to specialty cafes
core_concept: Neighborhood-based roasting cycles delivered via bicycle courier within 24 hours of roasting
proposed_approach: Partner with local home-roasters to fulfill orders within a 3-mile radius
prototype_scope: A single neighborhood pilot with 20 subscribers and 2 local roasters

title: Mobile Espresso Cart for Commuter Hubs
problem_or_desire: Long wait times at stationary coffee shops during morning rush hour
core_concept: A high-speed, pre-order-only mobile cart positioned at transit entry points
proposed_approach: App-based ordering with a 30-second pickup window at a designated transit stop
prototype_scope: One mobile cart at a single train station for one week

title: Hyper-local Seasonal Gleaner App
problem_or_desire: Difficulty sourcing surplus fresh, unrefined local produce for complex meals
core_concept: Peer-to-peer exchange of surplus backyard produce.
proposed_approach: A manual, community-moderated bulletin board for neighborhood produce sharing.
prototype_scope: A dedicated WhatsApp group for one street to post photos of surplus items for free pickup. | Identify 10 households with gardens; Create WhatsApp group; Facilitate 5 successful exchanges; Document pickup friction points
